HomePage.title: Aplicirano
HomePage.subtitle: All applications, statistics and smart tools in one place.
HomePage.jobs_insight: Import applications from CSV or TXT file and save time.
HomePage.jobs_description: All your applications in one place. Add, import, update statuses and stay organized throughout the process.
HomePage.stats_description: Overview of your job search results. See how many applications you sent, where you get responses and how long the process really takes.
HomePage.ai_description: Your AI assistant for job searching. Ask questions about your applications, prepare cover letters, improve your CV and plan next steps.
HomePage.profiles_insight: Tailor your applications with different profiles.
HomePage.profiles_description: Set up multiple applying profiles with personalized details. Switch between them to adapt your applications to different companies or roles.
HomePage.resume_insight: Keep your CVs organized and ready.
HomePage.resume_description: Store and manage multiple versions of your resume in one place. Quickly access and attach the right CV when applying.

ProfilePage.subtitle: Configure your applying profiles (up to 3). Profiles are personas for applying.

validation.description: Description must be at least 10 characters

ImportGuide.txt_step2: Select a .txt document containing company names you applied to.
ImportGuide.txt_important: **IMPORTANT** Separate each job or company name with a "-" symbol.
ImportGuide.csv_step1: Click the "Import" button and select a .csv file.
ImportGuide.csv_step2: The CSV file must contain a field named "title" referring to the company name.
ImportGuide.csv_step3: Each application is loaded as a row in the table.
ImportGuide.manual_step0: Select the profile and CV version that is using for job application
ImportGuide.manual_step2: Enter the company name and select the application date.
ImportGuide.table_step1: Double‑clicking on a job in the table opens a modal.
ImportGuide.table_step2: In the modal you can review and enter relevant details for the selected job.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Aplicirano ("we", "our", or "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.

section1.title: 1. What Data We Collect
section1.intro: We only collect data that is necessary to provide the core functionality of Aplicirano.
section1.item_applications: Job application data you enter (company name, position, dates, notes, links)
section1.item_documents: Uploaded documents such as CV files
section1.item_usage: Usage data for performance and debugging purposes

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
section2.intro: Your data is used exclusively to:
section2.item_provide: Provide and operate the Aplicirano platform
section2.item_enable: Enable job tracking, analytics, and AI-assisted features
section2.item_improve: Improve platform stability and user experience
section2.no_sell: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data.

section3.title: 3. AI Features
section3.intro1: Aplicirano provides AI-powered features to assist users with job applications, CV optimization, and insights.
section3.intro2: AI interactions are processed solely to deliver requested functionality. We do not use AI conversations or uploaded content for advertising or training our own models.

section4.title: 4. Data Storage & Security
section4.intro1: We use industry-standard services and security practices to protect your data. Access to personal data is restricted and protected.
section4.intro2: While we strive to protect your information, no online service can guarantee absolute security.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.intro: If you are located in the European Union, you have the right to:
section5.manage_account: You can manage or delete your account at any time from within the application.

section6.title: 6. Contact
section6.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us at:

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.intro: By accessing or using Aplicirano, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

section1.title: 1. Service Description
section1.content: Aplicirano is a software-as-a-service platform that helps users track, organize, and analyze job applications, store CVs, and use AI-assisted tools related to job searching.

section2.title: 2. User Responsibilities
section2.item_accuracy: You are responsible for the accuracy of the data you provide
section2.item_misuse: You must not misuse the platform or attempt unauthorized access
section2.item_illegal: You must not upload illegal or harmful content

section3.title: 3. Accounts
section3.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Aplicirano is not responsible for unauthorized access caused by user negligence.

section4.title: 4. Availability
section4.content: Aplicirano is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access or error-free operation.

section5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
section5.content: Aplicirano shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of the platform.

section6.title: 6. Termination
section6.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or misuse the platform.

section7.title: 7. Changes
section7.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes implies acceptance.

section8.title: 8. Contact
section8.intro: For questions regarding these Terms, contact:
